title: Phase I dose escalation of the Exportin 1 inhibitor, Selinexor, in combination with chemoradiation in patients with newly diagnosed glioblastoma.
abstract: Glioblastoma (GBM) remains associated with poor outcomes, with most recurrences occurring within the high-dose radiation field suggesting persistent radioresistance. Exportin 1 (XPO1) inhibition with Selinexor has demonstrated radiosensitizing effects in preclinical models. We conducted a phase I trial to evaluate the safety, tolerability, and preliminary efficacy of Selinexor in combination with standard chemoradiation for newly diagnosed GBM.
trial_name: Radiotherapy plus concomitant and adjuvant temozolomide for glioblastoma
